user_prompt: Find tickets that were escalated to engineering this month and group them by product component.
actual_output:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out. As Compass, our customer support agent, I handle ticket triage, response drafting, and escalations on a per-ticket basis—but querying and grouping historical escalation data across all tickets (like those escalated to engineering this month) is managed through our internal CRM tools (Intercom/Zendesk) and reporting dashboard in Notion.

I recommend checking the **Support Analytics** section in Zendesk or the **Weekly Support Digest** in Notion for escalation reports, which include breakdowns by product component. If you need help pulling a specific report or have a customer-facing ticket to triage, just share the details!

Best,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that the request fell under the 'Role scope' restriction in its system prompt regarding internal data processing and redirected the user to the appropriate CRM tools as instructed.
